ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Court has ordered the clerk to vacate sanctions previously issued in this case. Case is ordered dismissed without prejudice at the request of the plaintiff in Propria Persona in correspondence to the court dated 12/2/2003. Proceedings reported by: June Leathley. (212).

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2003 Continued To Dec-08-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/8/2003 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Margaret del Coto, CSR# 8493. (212)
